Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class ProofInitServiceUtil

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.ProofInitServiceUtil
public final class ProofInitServiceUtil extends Object
Provides static utility methods to get the following service:
  • POExtension listed at META-INF/services/de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.POExtension
  • DefaultProfileResolver listed at META-INF/services/de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.DefaultProfileResolver

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Profile
    getDefaultProfile(String profileName)
    Returns the Profile for the given name.
    static DefaultProfileResolver
    getDefaultProfileResolver(String profileName)
    Returns the DefaultProfileResolver for the given profile name.
    static ImmutableList<POExtension>
    getOperationPOExtension(ProofOblInput po)
    Returns the POExtension which supports the given ProofOblInput.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getOperationPOExtension

      public static ImmutableList<POExtension> getOperationPOExtension(ProofOblInput po)
      Returns the POExtension which supports the given ProofOblInput.
      Parameters:
      po - The ProofOblInput for which POExtension are requested.
      Returns:
      The available POExtensions.

    • getDefaultProfile

      public static Profile getDefaultProfile(String profileName)

      Returns the Profile for the given name.

      It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

      Parameters:
      profileName - The name of the requested Profile.
      Returns:
      The Profile with the given name for usage in the Thread of the user interface or null if not available.

    • getDefaultProfileResolver

      public static DefaultProfileResolver getDefaultProfileResolver(String profileName)
      Returns the DefaultProfileResolver for the given profile name.
      Parameters:
      profileName - The name of the profile.
      Returns:
      The corresponding DefaultProfileResolver or null if not available.
